author: Labtopia
description: Configurable duration and dismiss controls for toast notifications, so they don't disappear before you finish reading them. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Labtopia
manifest.description: Configurable duration and dismiss controls for toast notifications, so they don't disappear before you finish reading them.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Add a "Show recent toasts" log (any plugin's toasts, or core) - review one you missed, capped size, persists across restarts. Settings: keep log toggle, log size.

Release assets (main.js, manifest.json) now carry GitHub artifact attestations, built and published via GitHub Actions instead of manual local upload.

releases.author: tikitock
releases.description: Initial release. Patches Notice.prototype.setAutoHide so toast duration is configurable app-wide (every plugin's toasts and Obsidian core's), not just this plugin's own. Settings: minimum toast duration floor (default 8000ms, extends short toasts without shortening intentionally-longer ones) and a persist-until-dismissed toggle.
